import json
import pandas as pd

clinical_data = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-5698210746065490511'], 'r').read())
df_clinical = pd.DataFrame(clinical_data)

# Extracting vital_status, cancer_type_acr, and ParticipantBarcode from Patient_description
df_clinical['vital_status'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: 'Alive' if 'vital status: Alive' in x or 'Vital status: Alive' in x else ('Dead' if 'vital status: Dead' in x or 'Vital status: Dead' in x else None))
df_clinical['cancer_type_acr'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: x.split('diagnosed with ')[1].split('.')[0] if 'diagnosed with ' in x else None)
df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: x.split('barcode TCGA-')[1].split(',')[0].strip() if 'barcode TCGA-' in x else (x.split('patient TCGA-')[1].split(' ')[0].strip() if 'patient TCGA-' in x else None))

# Filter for BRCA patients who are alive
brca_alive_patients = df_clinical[(df_clinical['cancer_type_acr'].str.contains('Bladder urothelial carcinoma', na=False)) & (df_clinical['vital_status'] == 'Alive')]

# Select relevant columns and drop duplicates to get unique patient-histological type pairs
brca_alive_patients = brca_alive_patients[['ParticipantBarcode', 'histological_type']].drop_duplicates()

result = brca_alive_patients.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import pandas as pd
import re

clinical_data = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-5698210746065490511'], 'r').read())
df_clinical = pd.DataFrame(clinical_data)

# Extracting vital_status, histological_type, and ParticipantBarcode from Patient_description
df_clinical['vital_status'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: 'Alive' if re.search(r'vital status: Alive|Vital status recorded as Alive|Current vital status: Alive', x) else ('Dead' if re.search(r'vital status: Dead|Vital status recorded as Dead|Current vital status: Dead', x) else None))
df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: re.search(r'TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4}', x).group(0) if re.search(r'TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4}', x) else None)

# Filter for BRCA patients (Bladder urothelial carcinoma) who are alive
brca_alive_patients = df_clinical[(df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('Bladder urothelial carcinoma', na=False)) & (df_clinical['vital_status'] == 'Alive')]

# Select relevant columns and drop duplicates to get unique patient-histological type pairs
brca_alive_patients = brca_alive_patients[['ParticipantBarcode', 'histological_type']].drop_duplicates()

result = brca_alive_patients.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import json
import pandas as pd

brca_alive_patients_data = json.loads(locals()['var_function-call-14586279455988898855'])
df_brca_alive = pd.DataFrame(brca_alive_patients_data)

cdh1_mutations_data = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-4362790788882695679'], 'r').read())
df_cdh1_mutations = pd.DataFrame(cdh1_mutations_data)

# Ensure unique participant barcodes for CDH1 mutations
df_cdh1_mutations_unique = df_cdh1_mutations.drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

# Merge the dataframes
merged_df = pd.merge(df_brca_alive, df_cdh1_mutations_unique, on='ParticipantBarcode', how='left')

# Mark patients with CDH1 mutations
merged_df['CDH1_mutated'] = merged_df['Hugo_Symbol'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x == 'CDH1' else 0)

# Calculate total patients per histological type
total_patients_per_histological_type = merged_df.groupby('histological_type')['ParticipantBarcode'].nunique().reset_index()
total_patients_per_histological_type.rename(columns={'ParticipantBarcode': 'Total_Patients'}, inplace=True)

# Calculate mutated patients per histological type
mutated_patients_per_histological_type = merged_df[merged_df['CDH1_mutated'] == 1].groupby('histological_type')['ParticipantBarcode'].nunique().reset_index()
mutated_patients_per_histological_type.rename(columns={'ParticipantBarcode': 'Mutated_Patients'}, inplace=True)

# Merge total and mutated counts
summary_df = pd.merge(total_patients_per_histological_type, mutated_patients_per_histological_type, on='histological_type', how='left')

# Fill NaN with 0 for mutated patients where no mutations were found
summary_df['Mutated_Patients'] = summary_df['Mutated_Patients'].fillna(0)

# Calculate percentage of CDH1 mutations
summary_df['Percentage_CDH1_Mutations'] = (summary_df['Mutated_Patients'] / summary_df['Total_Patients']) * 100

# Sort and get top three
top_three_histological_types = summary_df.sort_values(by='Percentage_CDH1_Mutations', ascending=False).head(3)

result = top_three_histological_types.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import json
import pandas as pd
import re

# Correctly load the clinical data, accessing the first element of the list
brca_alive_patients_data = json.loads(locals()['var_function-call-14586279455988898855'][0])
df_brca_alive = pd.DataFrame(brca_alive_patients_data)

cdh1_mutations_data = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-4362790788882695679'], 'r').read())
df_cdh1_mutations = pd.DataFrame(cdh1_mutations_data)

# Ensure unique participant barcodes for CDH1 mutations
df_cdh1_mutations_unique = df_cdh1_mutations.drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

# Merge the dataframes
merged_df = pd.merge(df_brca_alive, df_cdh1_mutations_unique, on='ParticipantBarcode', how='left')

# Mark patients with CDH1 mutations
merged_df['CDH1_mutated'] = merged_df['Hugo_Symbol'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x == 'CDH1' else 0)

# Filter out rows where histological_type is 'None' before grouping
merged_df_filtered = merged_df[merged_df['histological_type'] != 'None']

# Calculate total patients per histological type
total_patients_per_histological_type = merged_df_filtered.groupby('histological_type')['ParticipantBarcode'].nunique().reset_index()
total_patients_per_histological_type.rename(columns={'ParticipantBarcode': 'Total_Patients'}, inplace=True)

# Calculate mutated patients per histological type
mutated_patients_per_histological_type = merged_df_filtered[merged_df_filtered['CDH1_mutated'] == 1].groupby('histological_type')['ParticipantBarcode'].nunique().reset_index()
mutated_patients_per_histological_type.rename(columns={'ParticipantBarcode': 'Mutated_Patients'}, inplace=True)

# Merge total and mutated counts
summary_df = pd.merge(total_patients_per_histological_type, mutated_patients_per_histological_type, on='histological_type', how='left')

# Fill NaN with 0 for mutated patients where no mutations were found
summary_df['Mutated_Patients'] = summary_df['Mutated_Patients'].fillna(0)

# Calculate percentage of CDH1 mutations
summary_df['Percentage_CDH1_Mutations'] = (summary_df['Mutated_Patients'] / summary_df['Total_Patients']) * 100

# Sort and get top three
top_three_histological_types = summary_df.sort_values(by='Percentage_CDH1_Mutations', ascending=False).head(3)

result = top_three_histological_types.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import json
import pandas as pd
import re

# Correctly load the clinical data, as it's already a list of dicts
df_brca_alive = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-14586279455988898855'])

cdh1_mutations_data = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-4362790788882695679'], 'r').read())
df_cdh1_mutations = pd.DataFrame(cdh1_mutations_data)

# Ensure unique participant barcodes for CDH1 mutations
df_cdh1_mutations_unique = df_cdh1_mutations.drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

# Merge the dataframes
merged_df = pd.merge(df_brca_alive, df_cdh1_mutations_unique, on='ParticipantBarcode', how='left')

# Mark patients with CDH1 mutations
merged_df['CDH1_mutated'] = merged_df['Hugo_Symbol'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x == 'CDH1' else 0)

# Filter out rows where histological_type is 'None' before grouping
merged_df_filtered = merged_df[merged_df['histological_type'] != 'None']

# Calculate total patients per histological type
total_patients_per_histological_type = merged_df_filtered.groupby('histological_type')['ParticipantBarcode'].nunique().reset_index()
total_patients_per_histological_type.rename(columns={'ParticipantBarcode': 'Total_Patients'}, inplace=True)

# Calculate mutated patients per histological type
mutated_patients_per_histological_type = merged_df_filtered[merged_df_filtered['CDH1_mutated'] == 1].groupby('histological_type')['ParticipantBarcode'].nunique().reset_index()
mutated_patients_per_histological_type.rename(columns={'ParticipantBarcode': 'Mutated_Patients'}, inplace=True)

# Merge total and mutated counts
summary_df = pd.merge(total_patients_per_histological_type, mutated_patients_per_histological_type, on='histological_type', how='left')

# Fill NaN with 0 for mutated patients where no mutations were found
summary_df['Mutated_Patients'] = summary_df['Mutated_Patients'].fillna(0)

# Calculate percentage of CDH1 mutations
summary_df['Percentage_CDH1_Mutations'] = (summary_df['Mutated_Patients'] / summary_df['Total_Patients']) * 100

# Sort and get top three
top_three_histological_types = summary_df.sort_values(by='Percentage_CDH1_Mutations', ascending=False).head(3)

result = top_three_histological_types.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)
